component.name: ActionButtonsPanel
component.script:
sub init() print "ActionButtonsPanel: init()" m.list = m.top.findNode("buttonList") setupButtons() m.list.observeField("itemSelected", "onButtonSelected") m.list.setFocus(true) end sub
sub setupButtons() rootNode = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") labels = [ "> AI Narrate", "~ Similar Streams", "# Compile Mobile", "@ Cross-Reference", "+ Zoom Video", "@ Enter URL" ] i = 0 while i < labels.count() child = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") child.title = labels[i] rootNode.appendChild(child) i = i + 1 end while
m.list.itemComponentName = "ActionButton" m.list.itemSize = [295, 70] m.list.itemSpacing = [0, 6] m.list.numRows = 6 m.list.content = rootNode end sub
sub onButtonSelected(event as Object) idx = event.getData() actions = ["AI Narrate", "Show Similar Streams", "Compile for Mobile", "Cross-Reference", "Zoom Video", "Enter URL"] if idx >= 0 and idx < actions.count() print "ActionButtonsPanel: selected=" + actions[idx] m.top.selectedAction = actions[idx] end if end sub
